title: No Gaps in Yo Items
description: This project was built for cases where Model Gap Fix does not solve the gaps on the items
body:
## 🔧 Also by me! go check it out.
- **[PingLess Attack Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/pingless-attack-indicator)** – Fixes the annoying attack cooldown sync bug and item bobbing up and down on high ping.

# No Gaps In Yo Items

**No Gaps In Yo Items** is a client-side Fabric mod focused on fixing visible gaps on 2D item models in cases where existing solutions fall short.

This project exists as a fallback for situations where **Model Gap Fix** doesn't fully fix the gaps on 2D generated item models. Rendering behavior can vary a lot depending on resource packs, specific items, and server environments, so this mod applies its own UV and model-generation adjustments to handle those cases more reliably.

---

## What it does

- Fixes model gaps on 2D generated item models
- Applies UV/model-generation tweaks to improve edge stability
- Works well across normal play and multiplayer
- Compatible with **all** resource packs, including ones that resize or reshape item models

---

## Known limitations

- **Tridents** — small pixel artifact near the right edge. Known issue, couldn't fix it without breaking other stuff
- **Golden apples** — may show a tiny white pixel on top of the model while eating. Also a known edge case
- A few small gaps may still show in certain texture packs with non-standard sword textures, *left as-is on purpose* to avoid causing other problems

Please report bugs on this mod as my new GPU **doesnt** have the problems with gaps still showing up after using fixes.

---

## Why this mod exists

Sometimes model gaps still appear after using existing fixes or being on 1.21.11+ so This mod is meant as a fallback for those cases. It was tested across resource packs, specific items, server environments, and different visual setups to make sure it holds up in real gameplay.

> I (LumyNova/Lumyrix) vibe coded this mod using Codex AI :)

---

## Bugs & Reports

Found a bug? Please report it even if its a small one, *it really helps!* Use the report issue button on the right side of this page or click [Here](https://github.com/LumyNovaOfficial/JustAPotionHud-MAINTAINED/issues).

---

## Quick disclaimer

Versions below **1.21.8** work fine but aren't fully optimized — with a lot of items on screen you might notice a small FPS drop compared to 1.21.8 and above. This mod can be freely used in any Optimization, QoL, PvP, or similar modpacks :)

If you have a banner or icon for this mod feel free to reach out on Discord: `YetAnotherFollowerOfChrist`

---

## Technical scope
- Loader: Fabric
- Minecraft: 1.21.x, 26.1.x
- Side: Client-only

---

## Future plans

Nothing here :) (all done)

*Jesus Loves you! He went on that cross for you — YES YOU — and for every singular human who has ever lived :)*
